Reason: RMSEA is designed for structural equation modeling and covariance/model-fit analysis. This project is a demand forecasting regression/time-series problem using SARIMAX, LightGBM, LSTM, and Hybrid models.
Forecasting_Alternative: Use RMSE, MAE, sMAPE, Forecast Accuracy, R², Normalized RMSE, and Directional Sensitivity instead.
Suggested_Report_Sentence: RMSEA was not used because it is not applicable to forecasting models; therefore, the study evaluates model performance using RMSE, MAE, sMAPE, Forecast Accuracy, R², Normalized RMSE, and Directional Sensitivity.
